title: ipam resolve output
description: Class-level, PROVIDER-AGNOSTIC (ADR-0111) ipam handle: the network identity the consumer injects into its build. `cidr` is the allocated prefix; `vlanId` and `gateway` are optional; `credentialRef` is a §2.5 CredentialRef NAME for any backend auth material — resolved at pod spawn, NEVER inline material. Every provider (NetBox, Nautobot, CAPI-IPAM) fills this same shape, so a provider swap changes zero consumer declarations. The handle is INJECTED into the build (ADR-0111 D3); it is never written to the net.subnet Facet (the Syncer's OBSERVE projection owns that).

cidr.description: The allocated prefix in CIDR notation (e.g. 10.30.4.0/24).

vlanId.description: The allocated 802.1Q VLAN id, when a VLAN was requested.

gateway.description: The gateway address for the allocated prefix, when the provider assigns one.

credentialRef.description: A §2.5 CredentialRef NAME (never material) for backend auth, when the handle carries one.
